post_merge_requires_target_and_timestamp.name: post_merge_requires_target_and_timestamp_chk
post_merge_requires_target_and_timestamp.value: ("post"."merged_into_post_id" is null and "post"."merged_at" is null) or ("post"."merged_into_post_id" is not null and "post"."merged_at" is not null)

post_merged_rows_must_be_archived_chk.name: post_merged_rows_must_be_archived_chk
post_merged_rows_must_be_archived_chk.value: "post"."merged_into_post_id" is null or "post"."archived_at" is not null
